title: Silky Citrusy Marshmallow Stir-fry
description: A raw-friendly and citrusy marshmallow dish for midnight cravings, inspired by Kenyan flavors with a silky texture and perfect for snacking or dessert.

ingredients.name: Ginger Powder
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of spice and brightness

ingredients.name: Citrus Juice (lemon, orange)
ingredients.notes: Choose one or mix for variety

instructions: Preheat your pan to medium heat.
Slice the miniature marshmallows into thin pieces, making sure they're raw-friendly varieties if necessary.
Add olive oil to the pan and wait until it's shimmering hot but not smoking.
Gently fry the marshmallow slices for about 30 seconds on each side or until golden brown.
Remove from heat and let them cool slightly before adding citrus zest, ginger powder, and lemon juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Add soy sauce and stir again until everything is fully incorporated and evenly coated with flavors.
Transfer the mixture onto a plate and serve immediately while warm for an extra burst of flavor.
